topicInput.title: New Reasoning Topic
topicInput.description: Enter your initial question, business challenge, or draft proposal. The system will organize multiple thinking frameworks for parallel reasoning and produce actionable conclusions.
topicInput.placeholder: Example: Two clients are unwilling to sign annual minimum agreements. How can we advance the deal without excessive concessions?

problemBrief.title: Phase 2: Problem Reshaping Dialogue
problemBrief.description: This phase focuses on requirement deconstruction and problem definition, not direct solutions. After clarification, click "Generate Expert Problem Brief" manually.
problemBrief.waitingFirst: Waiting for Problem Definer to initiate the first round of questions...
problemBrief.identified: Identified "Expert Problem Brief + Recommended Experts" code blocks. Ready to proceed to framework selection.
problemBrief.tip: Tip: The system won't auto-close. Please complete goals, constraints, red lines, and blind spots through dialogue before generating the "Expert Problem Brief".
problemBrief.inputPlaceholder: Continue adding your context, constraints, and real goals...

frameworkSelection.title: Phase 2: Framework Selection
frameworkSelection.description: The system will recommend frameworks based on the reshaped information. Select thinking frameworks to participate in reasoning (3-5 recommended).
frameworkSelection.editHint: Only the original problem and AI-reshaped issue are kept here. Changes will be used directly in subsequent reasoning.

consensus.title: Phase 4: Final Consensus & Delivery
consensus.toleratedRisks: Tolerated Risks (temporarily accepted, not final consensus)

actionPlan.title: Generate Action Plan
actionPlan.description: Answer the following questions to help us generate an actionable plan

diagnostics.title: Session Diagnostics
diagnostics.fallbackBreakdown: Parser repair {{parserRepair}} / Text fallback {{textFallback}} / Consensus fallback {{consensusFallback}}

iterationView.noDivergenceOutput: Reasoning has not produced output yet...
iterationView.noFrameworkCompletedPatch: No framework has completed round {{round}} patching
iterationView.consensusGenerating: Final consensus is being generated. Please check the version proposals first.
